title: Addendum — Product Brief: Orvex Studio
verdict_summary: This is an ADDENDUM / feature-seeds companion to the main brief, explicitly holding 'depth that earned a place but belongs downstream (PRDs, architecture, contract design), not in the brief.' It defines NO new formal requirement ids of its own; every FR it references (FR-MEM27 Claude native-memory adapter, FR-MEM16 MCP-KG interop, FR-UI20 Demo World aha-mechanic, FR-31 provenance) is present in covers-union.json. Every ruled-in build feature maps to an existing feature-map story home: outbound memory sync -> FR-MEM27 + FR-MEM16 (both covered); wizard task-first prompt builder -> 'Wizard task-first prompt-builder AI-assist backend'; Orvex rating -> 'Orvex rating — structural-quality AI scoring factor'; Prompt Composer -> 'Prompt Composer backend'; Demo World / ~8 persona demo datasets -> 'Demo World' + 'Phase-2 curation surfaces (Demo World...)'; beads->Librarian promotion edge -> 'beads->staging capture edge as the reliable capture path'; private memories + per-use consent -> 'Personal<->employer firewall + per-use consent' + 'Memory wall + full FR-31 provenance (private...)'; marketplace social layer (forking-with-lineage, gated reviews, reputation ledger) -> 'Marketplace, social & append-only reputation ledger'; Librarian preference/autonomy -> Librarian triage/learning-loop/maintenance-mandate stories. The remaining content is rulings, pricing strawmen (§5 superseded same-day), open questions, an ownership map, the six-surface acceptance protocol (already the program's acceptance spine), and explicit 'Follow-up owed' doc-amend/re-ratify obligations (amend Librarian brief fr7YaPq8Tl; re-ratify Vision CSqjqciAX9 Phase-1 paragraph; billing/ai canon amendments) — all definition-phase canon-hygiene work covered by the pack spine. No un-covered BUILD obligation found. Zero gaps.

components.name: Outbound memory sync (Orvex Memory -> vendor native memories)
components.quote: optionally sync Orvex Memory OUT to the native memories of the chat systems the user uses (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Grok)... Claude has a native memory-tool backend adapter (FR-MEM27, v1); OpenAI/ChatGPT is platform-blocked; MCP-KG interop (FR-MEM16) is the universal read/write fallback

components.name: Wizard-driven task-first prompt builder
components.quote: Say the task; the wizard interviews you... scans marketplace prompts, and composes the best prompt for the task from marketplace skills + Memory/wiki context via RAG — task-first instead of catalog-first search

components.name: Orvex rating (per-prompt computed quality score)
components.quote: every marketplace prompt carries an Orvex rating computed from multiple factors — structural quality... popularity/usage... and user upvotes

components.name: Private memories + per-use consent
components.quote: memories flaggable private; shown as private in every surface; a prompt-enrichment (Prompt Composer, Ask-your-wiki) that would use a private memory requires an explicit per-use opt-in

components.name: Librarian preference & autonomy system
components.quote: the Librarian learns curation rules from teaching-by-prompting... confirm-everything -> auto-when-confident -> fully automated... edits, deletes, and sensitive items are ALWAYS gated

components.name: beads->Librarian promotion edge
components.quote: the Librarian monitors the beads stream and proposes promotions into staging -> Memory/wiki... workgraph emits (or exposes a read surface over) the narration stream; staging consumes

components.name: Demo data ~8 persona versions
components.quote: demo data ships around 8 different persona versions... Teachers first per the wedge ruling

components.name: Marketplace core social layer
components.quote: Marketplace core social layer (forking-with-lineage, gated reviews, reputation ledger) IN; creator profiles + following-graph deferred

components.name: orvex-studio-workgraph (beads)
components.quote: Agent memory / beads -> orvex-studio-workgraph (explicitly NOT the memory product, ADR-0025)

components.name: Demo World aha-mechanic (FR-UI20)
components.quote: the Demo World aha-mechanic with visible enrichment citations (FR-UI20) and the demo-data graduation model
